mapper.insert:
insert into product
name = #{name},
brand = #{brand},
model = #{model},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
stock = #{stock},
image = #{image},
description = #{description},
specs = #{specs},
status = #{status},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
create_user = #{createUser},
update_user = #{updateUser},
mapper.update:
update product
name = #{name},
brand = #{brand},
model = #{model},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
stock = #{stock},
image = #{image},
description = #{description},
specs = #{specs},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from product where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select * from product where id in
#{id}

select p.id, p.name, p.brand, p.model, p.category_id, p.price, p.stock, p.image, p.description, p.specs, p.status, p.update_time, c.name as category_name from product p left join category c on p.category_id = c.id where p.id = #{id}
select * from product where category_id = #{categoryId} and status = #{status}

select p.id, p.name, p.brand, p.model, p.category_id, p.price, p.stock, p.image, p.status from product p inner join product_phone_model ppm on p.id = ppm.product_id where ppm.phone_model_id = #{phoneModelId} and p.status = 1 order by p.update_time desc

select p.id, p.name, p.brand, p.model, p.category_id, p.price, p.stock, p.image, p.description, p.specs, p.status, p.update_time, c.name as category_name from product p left join category c on p.category_id = c.id where p.status = 1 and ( p.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.brand like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.model like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) order by case when p.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') then 0 when p.brand like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') then 1 else 2 end, p.update_time desc
